sitemap_changes.lastmod_accuracy: Updated only for actually changed pages (none — only metadata/robots changes)

post_verification_steps.action: Resubmit sitemap in Google Search Console
post_verification_steps.method: GSC UI → Sitemaps → remove old → submit new, OR API resubmit

post_verification_steps.action: Submit sitemap in Bing Webmaster Tools

post_verification_steps.method: POST to IndexNow endpoint with updated URLs

prohibited: Google Indexing API for normal pages
